title: ZXBrick Controls
description: Master ZXBrick's controls and improve your paddle movement, ball control, and reaction times.
summary: Learn the controls, build consistency, and improve your performance with every game.

sections.heading: Master the Controls
paragraphs: Smooth, controlled paddle movement is the key to success in ZXBrick. Small, deliberate movements help you react quickly while keeping the ball under control.
As your confidence grows, you'll naturally develop the timing needed to handle faster gameplay and more challenging levels.

sections.heading: Before You Start
paragraphs: Take a moment to make sure the controls feel comfortable before beginning a longer session.
A quick warm-up game is often the best way to settle into the controls before chasing high scores or progressing through more difficult levels.
bullets: Start with simple shots to build confidence.
Avoid changing multiple settings during the same session.

featureShowcases.heading: Take Control
featureShowcases.summary: Good control is the foundation of every successful ZXBrick run.
body: Learning how the paddle responds is the first step towards mastering ZXBrick. Consistent movement, quick reactions, and accurate positioning will help you survive longer and score higher.
Whether you're playing for the first time or chasing leaderboard positions, improving your control will always make a difference.

image.caption: Master the controls and keep every ball in play.
